text.tspan: 16 specialists · one orchestrator · one YAML per artifact · one repo · every fix codified back into the line
16 SPECIALIST AGENTS — grouped by posture, isolated by lane
one specialist per content type · refuses to cross lanes
BUILD PIPELINES — YAML to wire format
MPB UI on devel → Source test → Verify (CHEAP LOOP)
TIER 2 · native Java SDK (when MPB can't express it)
Reach for when MPB hits a wall (hardware MPs, custom auth,
instanced groups, regex extraction, cross-request scalars)
Suite API push to a running VCF Operations instance.
rendered wire format. Drop on a colleague's laptop, they run
python3 install.py — works on any VCF Operations instance.
YAML source forever. Every artifact diffable, reviewable,
shareable. Auto-memory is disabled by design — knowledge
lives in the repo, not in a session.
CODIFICATION LOOP — every correction the user makes becomes a rule the next agent follows
If the rule can be mechanized,
so the next user never sees the
user starts at the new baseline.
When an author agent needs a capability the framework doesn't
have yet, it raises a TOOLSET GAP rather than silently
· PUNT to the user (trim the request)
· API-EXPLORER (we don't know the wire format)
Never ignore a gap report. Never silently downgrade.
lane discipline · recon before authoring · validate before installing · no fabricated keys · every correction codified · every artifact diffable
